title: What you noticed across the whole community
summary: Synthesis kit — ties together what the kid has noticed across the 15 prior kits (microbiology / microbiomes / immune system / disease stories / public health / extremophiles / global / research). Frames the cumulative learning as 'a naturalist's noticing' rather than a test of recall; recognition over performance. Trauma-informed register per ADR-016 + .claude/rules/distributed-narrative.md § cumulative-arc warmth. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase4Kits().

questions.prompt: Reviewer-signoff pending — Phase 4 synthesis kit question placeholder.
questions.explanation: Reviewer-signoff pending — questions ship in a future round once trauma-informed cumulative-arc register review completes per ADR-016.
